description_long: This is a modern beverage vending machine with a rectangular, upright form and a metallic exterior. The front face features a large, illuminated glass display window showcasing multiple rows of assorted drinks, including cans and bottles, with clear product visibility. Below the display, there is a prominent green Chilsung Cider logo and a StoryWay logo, both adding vibrant branding to the machine. The right side of the front panel contains a payment interface with coin and bill slots, a card reader, and a keypad for product selection, as well as a digital display for transaction information. The product retrieval slot is located at the bottom of the front face, covered by a horizontal flap. The sides and back of the machine are plain, metallic, and unadorned, with the back featuring a vent for cooling and power access.
description: A metallic beverage vending machine with a glass display window, prominent branding, and a payment interface on the front. The sides and back are plain, with a vent at the rear.
description_view_0: The left side of the vending machine, showing a plain, metallic surface with no visible features or branding.
description_view_1: The front view displays the illuminated product window, branding, payment interface, selection buttons, and the product retrieval slot.
description_view_2: The right side of the vending machine, similar to the left, is plain and metallic with no distinguishing features.
description_view_3: The rear view shows a plain metallic surface with a large vent at the bottom and a small access panel, with no branding or display.
attribute_display_panel: A rectangular, illuminated display panel is located on the upper front, showing the available drinks and their arrangement. There is also a small digital screen on the right side for transaction information.
attribute_payment_interface: The payment interface includes a coin slot, bill acceptor, and card reader, all located on the right side of the front panel, with clear labeling and a compact arrangement.
attribute_product_selection_buttons: Individual rectangular buttons are arranged vertically next to the product display, each corresponding to a specific drink, with clear labeling for easy selection.
attribute_product_retrieval_slot: A wide, horizontal slot with a flap is located at the bottom of the front panel for retrieving purchased products.
attribute_branding_or_signage: Large Chilsung Cider and StoryWay logos are prominently displayed on the lower front, with green and orange colors and clear text. Additional branding is visible above the display window.
